jobs.summary: Lead Product Manager at Carta responsible for driving strategy, prioritization, and product delivery across the platform to ensure market-leading offerings in private market infrastructure. You'll work on building intuitive solutions to complex problems in how ownership is managed and distributed globally.

jobs.title: Product Manager, AI Models
jobs.summary: Lead the AI Research and Enablement roadmap at Descript, sitting at the intersection of cutting-edge AI research, production ML infrastructure, and product strategy. You'll ensure AI capabilities are best-in-class while enabling product teams to ship AI-powered video editing features.

jobs.title: Product Manager, API & Platform
jobs.location: San Francisco, CA or Remote, US
jobs.summary: Build and own the API and developer platform that enables media companies to automate video editing at scale. This is a 0-to-1 product management role focused on creating infrastructure that turns Descript's editing capabilities into programmable workflows.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Editor
jobs.location: San Francisco, CA or Remote, US
jobs.summary: Product Manager for Descript's script-based video editing features, owning the core editing, recording, and AI-powered tools that help creators capture and perfect their content. You'll shape how users interact with cutting-edge AI video technology while working with a small, collaborative team on products that professional creators depend on.

jobs.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager (TPM)
jobs.summary: Senior Technical Program Manager responsible for building, optimizing, and scaling global GPU infrastructure at an AI company. Role focuses on product development, roadmap ownership, and cross-functional leadership across infrastructure teams including Observability, Storage, Network Engineering, and Security.

jobs.title: Senior product manager, datasets & objects
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy for transforming Watershed's data layer into an AI-powered intelligence platform with BI capabilities, data discovery, and schema architecture. Own the roadmap for shipping AI-native features like natural-language search, anomaly detection, and automated insights that help customers analyze data without exporting to Excel.

jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, Embedded Experience
jobs.summary: Staff Product Manager role owning Harvey's Embedded Experiences product area, responsible for integrating Harvey's AI capabilities into productivity tools like Microsoft Word and Outlook. Lead strategy and execution for plugins, add-ins, and native integrations that make Harvey an indispensable part of users' daily workflows.

jobs.title: Principal Product Manager, Agentic Benefits Operations
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for Gusto's agentic benefits operations, building AI-powered solutions to automate and simplify benefits administration for small businesses. Drive product vision, work cross-functionally with engineering and design, and leverage AI tools to deliver high-impact customer value.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Claude Code
jobs.summary: Product Manager role for Claude Code at Anthropic, responsible for driving the evolution of the AI coding product suite and shaping how developers interact with AI-powered development tools. The position requires translating advanced AI capabilities into practical features while building an ecosystem around CLI and related products.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Consumer
jobs.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY
jobs.summary: Product Manager for Anthropic's Consumer team responsible for building AI products that millions use daily. The role focuses on 0-to-1 product development, translating cutting-edge research into consumer products, and defining strategy for new consumer initiatives.

jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, AI Patient Experience
jobs.location: New York, New York, United States; San Francisco, California, United States; Seattle, Washington, United States
jobs.summary: Build AI-powered patient experience products at Headway, including therapist matching and between-session support tools in a HIPAA-compliant environment. Own the end-to-end product development from design through evaluation and safety infrastructure.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Video Creation & Editing (Principal-level)
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and vision for Synthesia's video creation platform (Editor, Player, and APIs) at a Principal level, owning the roadmap and driving unified workflows across creation, playback, and integration surfaces. Collaborate with Design, Engineering, and Infrastructure teams to deliver scalable, intuitive tools that empower enterprise users and developers to create videos at scale.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - Forecast
jobs.summary: Senior Product Manager for Gong Forecast who owns both the analytics layer for revenue leaders and the underlying data foundation that powers it. You'll drive the full product lifecycle from strategy through execution while enabling other teams across the Forecast group.

jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, Knowledge Platform
jobs.summary: Staff Product Manager role at Harvey AI responsible for building and scaling the Knowledge Platform, which integrates third-party legal tech connectors and data sources. You'll own the product strategy, roadmap, and execution for the ecosystem that connects Harvey's AI to the legal world's content and tools.

jobs.title: Product Manager, AI Studio
jobs.summary: Product Manager for Mistral AI Studio, an enterprise platform for building, evaluating, and operating AI systems at scale. You will define product strategy for a specific squad (Observability, Workflows, Connectors, etc.) and drive enterprise customers from prototype to production.

jobs.title: Program Manager, Revenue Enablement
jobs.summary: Design and implement sales enablement programs, playbooks, and training infrastructure to enhance the performance of Whatnot's revenue teams. Serve as a liaison between sales, operations, marketing, and product to ensure sellers have the knowledge, tools, and strategies needed to drive growth.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, Symmetry New Tax Products
jobs.location: Scottsdale, AZ;Denver, CO;San Francisco, CA;New York, NY
jobs.summary: Lead product management for new tax products at Symmetry Software, Gusto's payroll infrastructure division that powers 64 million paychecks annually. Drive product strategy, development, and delivery for tax compliance solutions while leveraging AI tools to accelerate team productivity.

jobs.title: Group Product Manager
jobs.summary: Lead the Core Experiences product group at Gong, responsible for the Homepage, Mobile, and Notifications as the 'Front Door' of the Revenue AI Operating System. Manage a team of senior product managers while setting strategy to transform the Homepage into an AI-powered insights cockpit and drive the mobile and meeting journey vision.

jobs.title: AI Product Manager
jobs.summary: Own the product roadmap for Scale AI's Computer Using Agent data vertical, building data pipelines and tools that enable AI researchers to train and evaluate intelligent agents. Partner with leading AI labs to shape product direction and drive execution across engineering, operations, and go-to-market.

jobs.title: Forward Deployed Product Manager, Enterprise
jobs.summary: Forward Deployed Product Manager embedded with enterprise customers to drive AI product deployments from contract to production while translating customer needs into platform product direction. Owns product outcomes for a portfolio of high-impact enterprise accounts and serves as the trusted escalation point for senior customer stakeholders.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.summary: Product Manager at Scale AI responsible for developing enterprise AI solutions that leverage generative AI and customer data to transform businesses. The role involves owning end-to-end product development, leading cross-functional teams, and turning custom solutions into repeatable, commercializable products.

jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, Agentic Platform
jobs.location: New York, NY; San Francisco, CA; Washington, DC
jobs.summary: Scale AI is seeking a Staff Product Manager to lead the development of agentic AI platforms for US government national security applications, owning the full product lifecycle from design through launch. The role requires managing complex government projects with multiple stakeholders while ensuring strict security, compliance, and ethical AI deployment standards.

jobs.title: Product Manager - Pricing & Billing
jobs.summary: Own Supabase's pricing and billing strategy as a high-leverage role that shapes monetization across the platform. Design fair, intuitive pricing structures that grow with developers while balancing product experience, growth, and revenue.

jobs.title: Product Manager, International Growth
jobs.summary: Lead the strategy and execution of Whatnot's international market expansion by owning the growth roadmap across acquisition, activation, engagement, and retention. Partner across teams to scale a standardized, high-quality buyer and seller experience across geographies while respecting local nuances.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Public Sector & Defence
jobs.summary: Senior Product Manager responsible for North's product strategy and roadmap across Canadian public sector and defence accounts, translating government compliance requirements into product investments. This is a customer-facing role requiring deep engagement with regulated government environments and their unique needs around data sovereignty, security, and accessibility.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Agent Harness & Modelling
jobs.summary: Own the execution layer for North's agentic AI platform, managing agent runtime, tool orchestration, and context engineering. Bridge the gap between the harness team and modeling team to ensure agents are reliable, capable, and production-ready for enterprise use.

jobs.title: Sr. Staff Product Manager
jobs.summary: Lead new AI-powered product ventures at HoneyBook, owning multiple bets from conception through product-market fit and growth. You'll drive clarity in ambiguous situations, build systems for cross-functional execution, and scale products across the AI-powered business management platform.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Enterprise
jobs.summary: Define how large organizations adopt and scale Notion by owning enterprise onboarding, permissions, integrations, and ease of adoption. Drive product strategy and cross-functional execution to make Notion a seamless, secure tool for enterprise teams.

jobs.title: Technical Program Manager, AI Delivery for Public Sector & Defence
jobs.summary: Technical Program Manager to serve as the bridge between Cohere's AI capabilities and public sector/defence customers, managing end-to-end technical program delivery while navigating complex government procurement, security, and compliance requirements. The role requires deep understanding of both frontier AI models and specialized government organizational needs.

jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, Identity Risk Solutions
jobs.location: Denver, Colorado, United States; San Francisco, California, United States
jobs.summary: Lead the strategy and development of Checkr's Identity Risk Solutions, a suite of products designed to prevent fraud and validate identity in the hiring process. Own the roadmap, market positioning, and cross-functional execution to build best-in-class fraud prevention capabilities that balance security with user experience.

jobs.title: Product Manager,  Platform Experience & Developer Product
jobs.summary: Own the developer and enterprise experience for Cohere's AI model platform, including managed services, APIs, SDKs, and developer tooling. Drive the roadmap across these areas while balancing near-term customer needs with long-term platform investment.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Safety Research
jobs.summary: A Safety Research PM role bridging Cohere's AI safety research with the North product platform, translating model evaluation findings into concrete safety features and guardrails. The role requires deep technical engagement with safety research while maintaining product instincts to prioritize and deliver safety controls.

jobs.title: Product Manager,  Native Experience & Growth
jobs.summary: Own the native mobile apps (iOS, Android, macOS) and front-end platform layer for Cohere's North agentic AI platform, while driving user discovery, adoption, and retention through onboarding and growth initiatives.

jobs.title: Director, Product Management (AI Search)
jobs.summary: Lead the long-term vision and execution of AI Search at Algolia, defining strategy and roadmap while working with engineering and ML teams to develop products that enable customers to optimize their search and discovery experiences. Partner with go-to-market teams to drive adoption and align technical development with customer needs and emerging search technologies.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, Data
jobs.summary: Own the product vision and execution for Algolia's data collection and transformation capabilities, empowering businesses to prepare high-quality data for AI search experiences. Lead two core pillars: a Data Transformation Platform that converts raw data into Algolia-ready formats, and Data Quality & Platform Services that establish standards and build scalable APIs.

jobs.title: Senior product manager, methodology
jobs.summary: Senior Product Manager for Watershed's Methodology team, responsible for setting direction on corporate sustainability data standards, methodologies, and datasets that power audit-ready emissions reporting. jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, Growth
jobs.location: Denver, Colorado, United States; San Francisco, California, United States
jobs.summary: Lead growth strategy and product development for Checkr's self-serve business, focusing on customer acquisition, conversion, onboarding, and lifetime value. Manage a cross-functional team to drive experimentation and optimize the entire customer journey.

jobs.location: New York, New York, United States; San Francisco, California, United States; Seattle, Washington, United States
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for therapist-facing engagement tools at Headway, including scheduling, telehealth, and patient communication features. jobs.title: Product Manager, Admin Platform
jobs.summary: Build and evolve Benchling's Admin Platform to provide enterprise customers with intuitive admin experiences for user management, permissions, compliance, and system configuration. jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for attracting, onboarding, and activating mental health providers on Headway's platform. Own the provider growth funnel including lead forms, credentialing, onboarding, and referral programs to scale access to affordable mental healthcare.

jobs.location: New York, New York, United States; San Francisco, California, United States; Seattle, Washington, United States
jobs.summary: Lead provider acquisition strategy for Headway's mental healthcare platform by developing and executing growth initiatives across SEO, SEM, and product optimization. jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, New Verticals
jobs.summary: Define and scale AI agent-powered solutions for Harvey's strategic customers by translating complex workflows into deployable products. Drive end-to-end customer implementations while identifying patterns to build repeatable, vertical-specific offerings.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.location: Foster City, CA (Hybrid) In office M,W,F
jobs.summary: Senior Product Manager to lead the user experience vision for AI-powered development tools at Replit, focusing on making software creation accessible through natural language interfaces. jobs.title: Product Manager, Payments
jobs.summary: Lead the product strategy and execution for Whatnot's core payments platform, owning the systems that power buyer payments, seller payouts, and money movement across the marketplace. jobs.title: Product Operations (Senior) Manager
jobs.summary: Lead product operations at Whatnot's livestream shopping platform, building scalable processes and frameworks that enable the product organization to execute strategy efficiently. Partner cross-functionally to streamline product work, ensure alignment, and drive operational excellence as the company scales.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.summary: Product Manager at Whatnot, the largest livestream shopping platform in North America and Europe, responsible for driving product strategy and execution across key marketplace initiatives. You'll partner cross-functionally with engineering, design, and operations to build impactful features for sellers and buyers across various product areas.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Video
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for Whatnot's core video platform that powers livestream shopping at scale, owning the end-to-end roadmap from ingestion to playback. jobs.title: Sr Product manager, supply chain data products
jobs.summary: Lead product management for Watershed's Supply Chain data products module and calculation engine, owning vision, roadmap, and cross-functional execution. jobs.title: Innovation Product Manager
jobs.summary: Work directly with leading law firms to translate complex legal work into AI-powered workflows, serving as a thought partner throughout discovery, design, deployment, and optimization. jobs.title: Innovation Product Manager, EMEA
jobs.summary: Innovation Product Manager role at Harvey AI focused on translating complex legal workflows into AI-powered solutions by working directly with leading law firms and enterprises. jobs.title: Senior Product Manager II
jobs.summary: Senior Product Manager for Strava's Maps tab and routing experience, responsible for owning these features end-to-end and shaping their long-term strategy. jobs.title: Staff Product Manager
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for Harvey's enterprise integrations and data search capabilities, focusing on building partnerships with strategic vendors and enabling AI-powered legal context retrieval.
